name: an-dr-sync
description: Keeps the an-dr VSCode extensions repo in sync: checks for updates on startup and on demand, pulls, rebuilds, and reloads. Auto-detects repo location via junction/symlink resolution.

commands.title: Sync: Open Repo in New Window

sync.repoPath.description: Absolute path to the extensions repo root. Leave empty to auto-detect via symlink/junction resolution from ~/.vscode/extensions.

sync.checkUpdatesOnStartup.description: Shortly after VS Code starts, check for repo updates and offer to pull and reload if any are found. Stays silent when already up to date.

sync.checkUpdatesOnStartupThrottleHours.description: Minimum hours between automatic startup update checks (tracked per machine). 0 checks on every launch.

sync.autoWipCommit.description: Automatically stage and commit all changes as a WIP commit once the repo has been quiet.

sync.autoWipCommitIntervalMinutes.description: Minutes of inactivity required before an automatic WIP commit fires, based on the newest-modified changed file. Checked every minute; no commit happens while files are still being actively edited.

sync.autoPush.description: Automatically push unpushed commits on a timer.

sync.autoPushIntervalMinutes.description: Interval in minutes between automatic pushes.
